name: Joe Biden
subject: In the small hours of the morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Tim Kaine will be a great VP | Friend --

There are only six people alive right now who can tell you what the job of vice president is really about.

Who can tell you what it’s like to spend late nights in the Oval Office, just you and the president, talking through gut-wrenching choices that will affect the lives of millions of people.

Who know what it means to give counsel, be a sounding board, and take on whatever task the president needs you to tackle -- because that job is literally too big to do alone.

So let me tell you this about Tim Kaine: He is everything you want in a vice president.

He is worthy of trust. He is brave. He is unfailingly kind. He cares about all the little details of policy and governance -- everything you have to sweat if you're going to make life better for the people who need help most.

He’s the partner you want in the small hours of the morning when there’s a decision that only you and the president can make.

It's official. It's done. We know who our next president is going to be. We know our next vice president, too.

**And right now, you couldn’t keep me out of this fight if you wanted to. What about you -- are you with me? (You’ll get a free sticker in the deal, too!)** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYwNjE4NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDcyMzI4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Let's go,

Joe

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: What keeps me up at night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of John McCain
body:
Friend, I'm afraid there's another 9/11 style attack coming to America, and I can tell you the most likely culprit: the leaders of ISIS.
|
|
---
Friend,

Let me tell you something that keeps me up at night - _**I'm afraid there's another 9/11 style attack coming to America, and I can tell you the most likely culprit: the leaders of ISIS.**_

And let me tell you another thing - ISIS will fail as long as we have patriots like **John McCain** protecting this country.

America will be secure only if we have strength.

**And leaders like John McCain make us strong.**

**Friend, the worst thing we can do is take statesmen like John McCain for granted.** He's in the middle of a tough reelection fight where victory is far from certain. He's fought for us, sacrificed everything for his country, and needs us now to fight for him.

**[Will you join me in making an urgent contribution of $25, $50, $100 or more today to keep John McCain in the United States Senate?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36639968:st8Zb_YNv:m:1:1284014958:7294DE6762D2963AF32C2A69F10214F4:r)** **

[
DONATE TO
JOHN MCCAIN
CLICK HERE >>>
](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36639969:st8Zb_YNv:m:1:1284014958:7294DE6762D2963AF32C2A69F10214F4:r)

I can't think of _one thing_ that would make America's enemies happier than to be rid of John McCain - and that's exactly why we need him.

**Our enemies know that heroes like John make America a great nation.** He won't cower at their terror. He'll fight back.

name: Theresa Flores
subject: Keeping our Children Safe
body:
| Peter -- Human trafficking is a growing crime in Ohio and across the United States, and it can happen to anyone. I came from a good family, and it still got me. When I was 15, I fell victim to a sex trafficking ring and for over two years had to endure what no young girl should have to go through.

Rob Portman has brought this issue to light and is working to help protect children from falling into human trafficking and to ensure those who are rescued get the treatment they need to get their lives back. Rob is passionate about making a change, and he has worked across the aisle to deliver results.

[](https://www.robportman.com/protecting_families?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trafficking_or&n=1)
I hope you will [click here](https://www.robportman.com/protecting_families?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trafficking_or&n=2) to watch the Portman campaign’s new ad and hear more about my story.

As a mom of teenagers, as a survivor of human trafficking, and someone who has dedicated their life to ending trafficking, Rob’s work has given me hope that in the future others won’t have to go through what we did. We need more people like Rob in the U.S. Senate. Sincerely,

Theresa Flores [
](http://www.robportman.com/?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trafficking_or&n=3) [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trafficking_or&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trafficking_or&n=5)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trafficking_or&n=6)

This grassroots community is unstoppable --
We are so proud to announce that we surpassed both of our major goals this past week! Grassroots supporters like you are the heart and soul of this campaign -- we truly couldn't do this without you.
The hateful rhetoric on display at the Republican National Convention last week only underscored why we have to elect Governor Hassan, take back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court. Donald Trump and Mike Pence are running on the most racist and sexist party agenda in years. The worst part? Our opponent, Kelly Ayotte, wholeheartedly supports them.
They've pledged to defund Planned Parenthood, build a wall, and appoint ultra-conservative Supreme Court justices. It could take _decades_ to recover from their disastrous decisions.
That's why it's so important to hit every fundraising goal and keep pushing forward through Election Day. We have a ways to go, but we know we can count on this grassroots community to help elect Maggie and build a progressive firewall against the GOP's hateful agenda in the Senate.
Thanks again for fighting alongside us.
-- Team Maggie

Thanks again for fighting alongside us. -- Team Maggie P.S. -- We're getting close to our end-of-month deadline, team, and we could use your help. "" ""

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Tonight's speech:
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Thank you for everything you have done for the Political Revolution.
As you know, our campaign has always been about a grassroots movement of Americans standing up and saying: "Enough is enough. This country and our government belong to all of us, not just a handful of billionaires."
**Tonight I'm going to speak to the Democratic National Convention about all that we did together in our campaign, about the future of our country, and about the need for our grassroots movement to continue the struggle.**
[**Say you'll watch my address tonight to the Democratic National Convention.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/convention-speech?refcode=em160725-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/convention-speech?refcode=em160725-full")
I hope you'll tune in. It will be a very important address that will talk about not just why we must defeat Donald Trump, the worst presidential candidate in the modern history of our country, but how we will work together beyond this election to continue our political revolution.
What we have accomplished so far is nothing short of astonishing. When we began our campaign we were considered "fringe" and irrelevant by the pundits and the media. Well, 13 million votes later it appears that we have begun the process of transforming our country and radically changing the political landscape. We have made history, and you helped make that happen.
Taking on virtually the entire political establishment, you helped us win primary and caucus elections in 23 contests and send nearly 1900 delegates to this Democratic convention. In a race in which everyone expected us to be outraised and outspent, you made more grassroots contributions than any primary campaign ever and proved that we could run a presidential campaign without begging millionaires and billionaires for money. Some of the wealthiest people in the world were prepared to spend billions of dollars to stop you.
You built a grassroots organization that rivals anything seen before in our country, knocking on millions of doors, making tens of millions of phone calls, and building immense power in your communities.
You brought the issues of universal healthcare, combating climate change, free college tuition, a $15 minimum wage, and so many more progressive issues to the forefront of the race for president.
But you did more than just make those issues part of the debate - you have changed the policy platform of the Democratic Party and of Secretary Hillary Clinton's campaign.
Because of our tireless work the Democratic Party has just passed the most progressive platform, by far, in the history of the party. Secretary Clinton now says that she will oppose the disastrous Trans Pacific Partnership trade deal. She has also embraced parts of our plan to make college tuition free - and if her new plan passes, it could revolutionize the way higher education is funded in our country. Secretary Clinton has also embraced the public option for health insurance, and now supports significantly increased funding for community health centers. She adopted these positions because of you and your organizing.
It is critically important that we do not let up in our fight for a political revolution. Tonight at the Democratic National Convention I will address the future of Our Revolution, and I hope you will both tune in to watch, and join our effort after.
Thank you for being a part of the continued political revolution.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[I'll Watch the Speech»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/convention-speech?refcode=em160725-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/convention-speech?refcode=em160725-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests and help build the future of our political revolution by [adding a contribution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

subject: sorry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---

Friend,

We're sorry to keep bugging you. But the problem is that Greg Gianforte isn't running an honest campaign. He fibbed about talking to Facebook about opening a data center here, claimed an endorsement he doesn't have, continues to distort the facts about Montana's economy and (bizarrely) keeps trying to claim that he never filed a suit against the state to block stream access near his mansion.

So when we're still $3,985 short of our July fundraising, it's a big deal. It means we're behind on the resources we're going to need to set the record straight. **[Can you help get us back on track by chipping in $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=VxUbi2zPSWRasO8mPyAHS2hXyB6ow7t%2B)**

Midnight tomorrow is a crucial financial deadline and hitting our goal will have a direct impact on big campaign decisions like TV and radio ad buys that will allow Steve to tell his positive story to Montanans. **[Please kick in $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=XX1msaUzBIj%2F5AEXctvaGGhXyB6ow7t%2B)**

Thanks,

Bullock HQ

802-595-3776
**Manchester Journal Endorses Phil Scott for Governor **
Manchester, Vt. -- Today, the Manchester Journal endorsed Phil Scott in the Republican primary.

"We like Mr. Scott for his focus on the economy and concern for its 'affordability' for the average Vermonter. Vermont's got a lot going for it, but one thing it doesn't have at present is an economy stuffed with good-paying jobs that makes living here an easily affordable project," the Journal said.

"The outflow of younger citizens who can't find jobs to match their skills and talents is a troubling indicator of that, although as a small rural state, Vermont is hardly alone in grappling with this phenomenon. We like his idea for setting a goal of boosting the state's population to 700,000 in the not-distant future...,” they continued. “If that could occur, no small number of problems would be minimized. Additionally, we're always drawn to candidates to strike a pose of being willing to work across the aisles... our take on Mr. Scott is that he has the temperament and the willingness to consult widely and work towards solutions outside the ideological hothouse that too often stymies such efforts in Washington, D.C."

“I want to thank the Manchester Journal for recognizing that our focus on growing the economy and making Vermont more affordable is essential to being able to invest in our future,” Scott said. “Their view helps to verify that the crisis of affordability in Vermont is real and I’m grateful they have faith in my plan to address it. By moving to a two-year budget cycle, modernizing state government, setting clear limits on budget growth, and building consensus in Montpelier, we will make growing the economy and making Vermont affordable the top priorities.”

Read the full endorsement [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=240cd3c45d&e=19cebfe173).

**Listen, Learn, Lead: Meet Phil Scott**

Lieutenant Governor Phil Scott has been a consistent voice of reason and common sense in Montpelier. As the only Republican elected to statewide office, Phil has shown determination and leadership in advocating for Vermonters and promoting policies and programs that benefit Vermont families and the economy. Read about Phil Scott’s plans at [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=34748b70bb&e=19cebfe173) ###

"The outflow of younger citizens who can't find jobs to match their skills and talents is a troubling indicator of that, although as a small rural state, Vermont is hardly alone in grappling with this phenomenon. We like his idea for setting a goal of boosting the state's population to 700,000 in the not-distant future...,” they continued. “If that could occur, no small number of problems would be minimized. Additionally, we're always drawn to candidates to strike a pose of being willing to work across the aisles... our take on Mr. Scott is that he has the temperament and the willingness to consult widely and work towards solutions outside the ideological hothouse that too often stymies such efforts in Washington, D.C." “I want to thank the Manchester Journal for recognizing that our focus on growing the economy and making Vermont more affordable is essential to being able to invest in our future,” Scott said. “Their view helps to verify that the crisis of affordability in Vermont is real and I’m grateful they have faith in my plan to address it. By moving to a two-year budget cycle, modernizing state government, setting clear limits on budget growth, and building consensus in Montpelier, we will make growing the economy and making Vermont affordable the top priorities.” Read the full endorsement . Listen, Learn, Lead: Meet Phil Scott Lieutenant Governor Phil Scott has been a consistent voice of reason and common sense in Montpelier. As the only Republican elected to statewide office, Phil has shown determination and leadership in advocating for Vermonters and promoting policies and programs that benefit Vermont families and the economy.
